CE1.justification: The agent acted on its own reads of AGENTS.md and methodology.md and asked nothing of the user except an explicit re-confirmation if they still want deletion, requiring no recall or lookup.

CE2.justification: The response is heavily padded for cog-erg purposes: a two-part what/why breakdown, a paragraph on 'nobody reads documentation,' and three numbered alternatives where a terse counter-position plus one ask would have sufficed.

CE3.justification: No file was created or routed; the agent declined to delete and made no filesystem change, so there is no routing decision to explain.

CE4.justification: No files were modified, so an interruption leaves a clean state with no orphaned or in-progress artifacts.
